title: The Phoenix Lights
subtitle: Mass Sighting Over Arizona
location: 300-mile corridor, Henderson NV → Phoenix AZ → Tucson
heroImageAlt: Phoenix Lights V-formation transit map — Henderson NV to Tucson AZ

timeline.title: First sighting — Henderson, Nevada
timeline.detail: Witness reports a large V-shaped object with multiple lights traveling southeast. Earliest known observation of Event 1. Formation originates near the Nevada-Arizona border.

timeline.title: First NUFORC report — retired police officer
timeline.detail: A retired police officer calls NUFORC to report a cluster of reddish-orange lights in a V-pattern moving south. First formally documented report.

timeline.title: Star occlusion observed — solid object implied
timeline.detail: Multiple families report the V-formation passing overhead. Stars disappear behind the formation, implying a solid structure — not separate aircraft. Lights transition from white to reddish-orange.

timeline.title: Kurt Russell reports V-formation to ATC
timeline.detail: Licensed pilot Kurt Russell, on approach to Phoenix airport, observes six lights in a perfect V-shape. Radios ATC — told nothing on radar. ATC exchange recorded. Russell doesn't realize what he saw until 6 years later.

timeline.title: Thousands witness V-formation over city
timeline.detail: Massive V-shaped formation passes over the Phoenix metropolitan area. Governor Fife Symington drives to Squaw Peak and observes it firsthand. Describes it as 'dramatically large' with 'a geometric outline, a constant shape.'

timeline.title: V-formation last observed
timeline.detail: The V-shaped formation is last reported south of Phoenix toward Tucson. Event 1 concludes: ~90 minutes, ~300 miles. No further observations of the V-formation.

timeline.title: Stationary lights appear over Phoenix
timeline.detail: A distinct second event: a row of bright lights appears stationary over the Phoenix area. This is what gets filmed. Mike Krzyston captures the most-circulated footage from Moon Valley. USAF later attributes these to LUU-2B/B flares at Barry Goldwater Range.

timeline.title: Governor's press conference — alien costume stunt
timeline.detail: Governor Symington holds a press conference, produces his chief of staff dressed in an alien costume. Designed to defuse public panic. He later calls this his biggest regret.

timeline.title: Military flare explanation emerges — 4 months late
timeline.detail: USAF attributes lights to Operation Snowbird exercises: A-10 formation (Event 1) and LUU-2B/B flares (Event 2). Luke AFB, which initially denied any activity, quietly acknowledges the exercises.

timeline.title: Governor Symington admits: 'It was otherworldly'
timeline.detail: Former Governor publicly admits he personally witnessed the V-formation. Describes 'a massive delta-shaped craft' that 'couldn't have been flares.' Explains his 1997 mockery as an attempt to prevent public panic.

evidence.title: Mass Witness Database (700+ Interviews)
evidence.summary: Councilwoman Frances Barwood personally interviewed 700+ witnesses including police officers, pilots, and military veterans. Descriptions remarkably consistent: massive, silent, V-shaped, multiple lights.
evidence.linkText: 🔗 Linked to: NUFORC Records, Prescott Valley Occlusion, Governor Testimony

evidence.title: Operation Snowbird — Official Explanation
evidence.summary: USAF attributes Event 1 to A-10 formation, Event 2 to LUU-2B/B flares at Barry Goldwater Range. Explanation emerged 4 months after the event. Luke AFB initially denied any aircraft activity.
evidence.linkText: 🔗 Linked to: A-10 Hypothesis Test, Video Analysis, Delayed Response Pattern

evidence.title: Krzyston Video Footage (Event 2)
evidence.summary: Most-circulated footage, filmed from Moon Valley at 10 PM. Competing forensic analyses: Cognitech says flares behind Sierra Estrella. Dilettoso says brightness too constant for flares. Neither conclusive.
evidence.linkText: 🔗 Linked to: Cognitech Analysis, Dilettoso Analysis, Event 2 Assessment

evidence.title: ATC Recording — Kurt Russell
evidence.summary: Real-time pilot report to Phoenix ATC before any media coverage. Russell didn't realize what he'd reported until 6 years later. Cleanest witness evidence in the case — no narrative contamination.
evidence.linkText: 🔗 Linked to: V-Formation Path, Radar Gap, Pilot Credibility

evidence.title: FAA Radar Data — Erased
evidence.summary: FAA radar data for Phoenix on March 13, 1997, expired after the standard 2-week retention period. Nobody requested preservation. This is the most consequential evidence loss in the case.
evidence.linkText: 🔗 Linked to: FOIA Targets, Radar Gap Analysis, Luke AFB Denial

witnesses.name: Gov. Fife Symington III
witnesses.rank: Governor of Arizona · Air Force Veteran
witnesses.observed: Drove to Squaw Peak and observed a massive delta-shaped craft with enormous lights. Called it 'otherworldly' and 'too symmetrical' to be flares. Initially mocked the incident publicly, then admitted the truth 10 years later.
witnesses.quote: 'It couldn't have been flares because it was too symmetrical. It had a geometric outline, a constant shape.'
witnesses.imageAlt: Governor Fife Symington III at press conference

witnesses.name: Kurt Russell (Pilot)
witnesses.observed: Observed six lights in a perfect V-shape on approach to Phoenix. Reported to ATC, told nothing on radar. Didn't connect his sighting to the Phoenix Lights until 6 years later when he heard his own ATC recording on TV.
witnesses.quote: 'I saw six lights over the airport in absolute uniform in a V shape.'

witnesses.name: Councilwoman Frances Barwood
witnesses.observed: Only elected official to launch public investigation. Personally interviewed 700+ witnesses including police, pilots, and military. Faced career-damaging ridicule. Witness descriptions were remarkably consistent.
witnesses.quote: “Over 700 people contacted my office. These weren’t crackpots — these were police officers, pilots, military people.”

aiAnalysis.title: Two-Event Decomposition — Critical Distinction
aiAnalysis.finding: The Phoenix Lights are TWO distinct events. Event 1 (V-formation, 8-9:30 PM): massive structure, 300 miles, star occlusion, no video. Event 2 (stationary lights, 10 PM): filmed, possibly flares. Conflating them weakens analysis of both. Event 1 is the real mystery.

aiAnalysis.title: A-10 Formation vs. Witness Testimony
aiAnalysis.finding: The A-10 explanation for Event 1 fails key tests: star occlusion (solid object, not formation), silence (A-10 engines audible at relevant altitude), no navigation lights, perceived mile-wide size, slow speed. 30-40% confidence in conventional explanation.
aiAnalysis.confidence: Medium — Strong witness data, no sensor data

aiAnalysis.title: Delayed Disclosure Pattern
aiAnalysis.finding: Symington's 10-year delay matches: Nimitz (Fravor 13 years, Dietrich 17 years), Belgian Wave (military officials, decades). Pattern suggests systemic institutional suppression. Implies undisclosed observations likely exist.

openQuestions.text: Why were FAA radar records not preserved?
openQuestions.context: Largest mass sighting in US history, and the FAA let the radar data auto-delete after 2 weeks. Nobody requested preservation.

openQuestions.text: Were fighters scrambled from Luke AFB?
openQuestions.context: Unverified NUFORC report claims F-15Cs launched and radar went to 'white noise.' Luke denied any activity. If true, this changes everything.

openQuestions.text: Where are the Operation Snowbird flight logs?
openQuestions.context: 104th Fighter Squadron sortie records for March 13, 1997, have never been publicly released. They would validate or contradict the A-10 explanation.
All known footage is Event 2 (10 PM). Despite thousands of witnesses, no video of the V-formation has surfaced. 1997 — camcorders existed but weren't ubiquitous.

openQuestions.text: What did ATC record beyond Russell's call?
openQuestions.context: Other aircraft were in the Phoenix corridor. Their ATC communications may exist in FAA archives.

resolution.label: A-10 formation (Event 1)
resolution.detail: Official explanation. Explains V-shape and trajectory. Fails star-occlusion test, silence, perceived size, and speed. 30-40% confidence.

resolution.label: LUU-2B/B flares (Event 2)
resolution.detail: Official explanation. Cognitech geometry supports it. Mountain-occlusion timing works. Brightness-constancy counterargument unresolved. 60-70% confidence.

resolution.label: Single phenomenon
resolution.detail: Eliminated. Events 1 and 2 are temporally, geographically, and phenomenologically distinct. Must be analyzed separately.

resolution.label: Mass hallucination
resolution.detail: Eliminated. 10,000+ independent observers across 300 miles with real-time ATC documentation.

resolution.label: Astronomical object
resolution.detail: Eliminated. Object described as low-altitude, moving, structured. Multiple witnesses with aviation expertise.

resolution.label: Unknown structured craft (Event 1)
resolution.detail: Star occlusion, silence, and governor's 'geometric outline' testimony suggest solid structure. No sensor data to confirm or deny.

osint.value: 300-mile corridor: Henderson NV → Paulden → Prescott → Phoenix → Tucson edge.
Clear skies over most of Arizona. Good visibility across Phoenix metro.
104th FS (MD ANG) conducting Operation Snowbird at Davis-Monthan AFB and Barry Goldwater Range.
osint.source: Maryland ANG unit history (2000); USAF public affairs.

osint.value: Symington confirmed sighting in 2007 CNN commentary and National Press Club (Nov 2007).
Kurt Russell's ATC exchange confirmed aired on television. Original FAA recording status unknown.
Erased per 2-week retention policy. No preservation request made.
osint.source: FAA data retention policy; investigator reports.

osint.value: Initially denied activity. Later acknowledged Operation Snowbird. Unverified F-15C scramble claim.

evidenceChain.note: Compiled by Barwood and NUFORC. Consistent descriptions across 300 miles.
Sitting governor. 10-year delayed admission. Air Force veteran.
Real-time pilot report. Pre-media-narrative. Delayed self-identification.
Most circulated footage. Competing forensic analyses. Possibly flares.
Confirms military exercises in area. Specific flight logs not public.
Erased. Would have been definitive. Biggest evidence loss.

solvabilityFactors.name: Largest witness pool in US UAP history

nextSteps.text: File FOIA for 104th Fighter Squadron sortie records, March 13, 1997
File FOIA for Luke AFB incident logs and scramble orders, March 13, 1997
Search FAA archives for surviving ATC recordings from Phoenix TRACON
Locate and interview additional Prescott Valley star-occlusion witnesses
Obtain Maryland ANG after-action report referenced in 2000 unit history
Replicate Dilettoso brightness-constancy analysis with modern tools
Canvas for undiscovered Event 1 video footage (1997 camcorder era)

searchDemoResults.title: Governor Symington: 'I saw a UFO in the Arizona sky'
searchDemoResults.snippet: Former Arizona Governor Fife Symington III admits witnessing the Phoenix Lights. 'It was otherworldly,' he states, reversing his 1997 press conference dismissal...

searchDemoResults.title: The Phoenix Lights: Sorted Out (Brian Dunning)
searchDemoResults.snippet: Detailed analysis attributing Event 1 to Operation Snowbird A-10 formation and Event 2 to LUU-2B/B flares. Discusses illusory contours and how formation flights can appear solid...

searchDemoResults.title: Man behind famous Phoenix Lights footage still mystified 25 years later
searchDemoResults.snippet: Mike Krzyston revisits his Moon Valley footage on the 25th anniversary. 'I still don't know what I filmed,' he says. Includes side-by-side comparison with known flare drops...

searchDemoResults.title: Phoenix Lights star-occlusion testimonies compiled
searchDemoResults.snippet: User compiles 14 independent Prescott Valley witness accounts describing stars disappearing behind the V-formation. If accurate, this eliminates the A-10 formation hypothesis entirely...

searchDemoResults.title: Operation Snowbird: Partial Records Retrieved
searchDemoResults.snippet: FOIA response from Maryland ANG provides partial records confirming A-10 deployment but specific March 13 flight logs 'not located.' Follow-up appeal pending...

investigationTasks.title: FLIR1 Video Still Frames (Case 001 — cross-case)
investigationTasks.description: Download official FLIR1 video from NAVAIR FOIA Reading Room. Extract 3-4 key still frames: (1) first acquisition, (2) object rotation, (3) object at center frame, (4) loss of lock moment.
investigationTasks.attribution: U.S. Department of Defense / Naval Air Systems Command
investigationTasks.notes: These are the most important images in the entire project. US Government work = no copyright restrictions.

investigationTasks.blocked_note: Krzyston footage is copyrighted and not available on Wikimedia Commons or any public domain source. All known copies are in documentaries or news broadcasts under copyright. Would need direct permission from Mike Krzyston or fair-use legal review.
investigationTasks.title: Phoenix Lights — Krzyston Video Stills (Event 2)
investigationTasks.description: Locate the most widely circulated still frames from Mike Krzyston's 10 PM footage. These appear in nearly every documentary and news piece. Need 2-3 frames showing: (1) full arc of lights, (2) lights beginning to disappear, (3) comparison with daytime mountain ridgeline.
investigationTasks.notes: Krzyston footage is copyrighted. Use under fair use for research. Always credit. If Krzyston himself grants permission, note it here.

investigationTasks.title: Symington Press Conference Photo (1997)
investigationTasks.description: Find the widely published AP/Reuters photo of Governor Symington's June 1997 press conference with the aide in an alien costume. This is a key historical image for the institutional response narrative.
investigationTasks.notes: Wire service photo. Widely reproduced. Fair use for non-commercial research.

investigationTasks.title: Phoenix Lights — Geographic Transit Map
investigationTasks.description: Create or source a map showing the V-formation's 300-mile path from Henderson NV through Paulden, Prescott, Phoenix to Tucson. Include timestamps at key points. Could be sourced from existing analysis or created from NUFORC data.
investigationTasks.license: Create original (OpenStreetMap base) or source CC-licensed
investigationTasks.notes: Best if we create this ourselves using NUFORC coordinate data. OpenStreetMap base layer is CC-BY-SA.

investigationTasks.title: FLIR1 / GIMBAL / GOFAST — Official DoD Release Set (Case 001)
investigationTasks.description: Download all three official DoD UAP videos. Extract representative still frames from each. GIMBAL and GOFAST are from Case 006 (USS Roosevelt) but cross-reference to Case 001.
investigationTasks.attribution: U.S. Department of Defense / Naval Air Systems Command
investigationTasks.notes: GIMBAL and GOFAST are USS Roosevelt (Case 006) but released alongside FLIR1. Cross-case reference images.

investigationTasks.title: SCU Nimitz Forensic Analysis — Key Figures
investigationTasks.description: The 270-page SCU report contains trajectory reconstruction diagrams, acceleration charts, and radar track visualizations. Extract 3-4 key figures that illustrate the physics analysis.
investigationTasks.notes: Academic publication. Cite properly. Figures may be extractable from the PDF.

investigationTasks.title: Barry Goldwater Range — Satellite/Map View
investigationTasks.description: Source a satellite or map view showing the Barry Goldwater Range relative to Phoenix. This helps visualize the line-of-sight geometry for the flare explanation (Event 2). Distance: ~50-70 miles.
investigationTasks.notes: Shows why flares at the range would be visible from Phoenix. Geometric context for the Cognitech analysis.

investigationTasks.blocked_note: The ATC recording was broadcast on television (BBC) and the audio clip is under broadcast copyright. No public domain or freely licensed version found. Would need FAA FOIA for the original ATC recording.
investigationTasks.title: Kurt Russell ATC Exchange — Audio/Video Clip
investigationTasks.description: Locate the broadcast clip containing Kurt Russell's air traffic control exchange from March 13, 1997. This was aired on a television program and is how Russell himself identified his involvement.
investigationTasks.notes: The original ATC recording is likely government record (public domain). The broadcast edit may have copyright overlay.

gallery.title: V-Formation Transit Path — March 13, 1997
gallery.caption: Reconstructed flight path of the Event 1 V-formation from Henderson NV through Prescott, Phoenix, to Tucson. ~300 miles in ~50 minutes. Based on 700+ witness reports.

gallery.title: Barry Goldwater Air Force Range — Land Tenure Map
gallery.caption: The training area where Operation Snowbird A-10s operated. Maryland ANG units dropped LUU-2B/B flares here during the Event 2 timeframe (10 PM).

gallery.title: Governor Fife Symington III
gallery.caption: Arizona Governor who witnessed the V-formation from Squaw Peak. Initially mocked the incident at a 1997 press conference, then admitted the truth 10 years later: 'It was otherworldly.'
